task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Fix the page layout so content is vertically centered.

1. Wrap the entire page in a flex column div with minHeight: '100vh'
2. The nav stays at the top
3. The content area (the div with maxWidth 560px) should be inside a flex:1 div that centers it both horizontally and vertically:
<div style={{flex:1, display:'flex', alignItems:'center', justifyContent:'center', padding:'0 40px'}}>
  <div style={{width:'100%', maxWidth:'560px'}}>
    ... existing content ...
  </div>
</div>

4. Remove the padding:'48px 40px' and margin:'0 auto' from the inner content div — the outer wrapper handles centering now.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Content is vertically centered in viewport
Nav stays at top
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: break any logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
